description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named github-Linux-32bit that runs on push to the develop branch and on pull requests to files excluding markdown. The workflow should have read-all permissions and allow concurrent runs with cancel-in-progress for pull requests. Use a single ubuntu-latest job in a container, checking out the code, installing multilib support, configuring Kokkos with specific CMake flags for 32-bit builds, building the project in parallel, and running tests with output on failure.
